scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.typecheck:api: cd apps/api && uv run mypy app tests
scripts.bootstrap:api: cd apps/api && uv run python -m app.cli.bootstrap
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.worker: cd apps/worker && uv run python -m worker.main
